goal: Resolve the remaining M6-RC blocker by auditing and, if feasible, collecting evidence for real trained CUDA lora_adapter inference without MIB_RUNTIME_ALLOW_FAKE_BACKEND. Search for an existing real adapter artifact, inspect hardware/dependency feasibility for producing one, and record either passing real-adapter Docker endpoint evidence or a concrete blocker. Do not change product code, do not fake adapters, do not weaken validation, and do not claim M6-RC GO without real adapter inference evidence or an explicit release-policy decision.
head: efecb80
blocked_scope: Runtime, loader, verifier, schema, API, DB, worker, FE, or benchmark changes
Creating fake adapters or pretending a fixture adapter is trained
Weakening output validation or model cache validation
M6-RC GO/sign-off changes before real adapter evidence or release-policy decision
allowed_edit_paths_scope_note: This evidence gate may read product code and create temporary probes under /tmp. Repo edits are limited to evidence and operational handoff files.
required_evidence: Search result for existing non-fixture adapter artifacts
Runtime dependency availability check for transformers/peft/torch/LLaMA-Factory
If a real adapter exists, Docker endpoint transcript without MIB_RUNTIME_ALLOW_FAKE_BACKEND
If no real adapter exists, concrete next required action and exact missing condition
If a generated adapter probe is attempted, explicitly classify it as real-loader evidence or not-trained evidence, not trained-adapter acceptance
executed_verification_commands: PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 ./.venv/bin/python -c "import importlib.util, json; mods=['torch','transformers','peft','bitsandbytes','llamafactory','accelerate','safetensors']; print(json.dumps({m: importlib.util.find_spec(m) is not None for m in mods}, sort_keys=True))"

docker run --rm mib-export-989c1bbe5246469a8a9839cf4c5340ef:latest python -c "import importlib.util, json; mods=['torch','transformers','peft','safetensors','accelerate','bitsandbytes']; print(json.dumps({m: importlib.util.find_spec(m) is not None for m in mods}, sort_keys=True))"
warnings: M6 acceptance requires real adapter inference; fixture or fake backend evidence is insufficient for GO.
Do not run destructive cleanup on user or temp artifacts.
Large model/cache/adapter artifacts must remain outside git.

phase_notes.plan: Open scoped evidence contract for real adapter inference feasibility and blocker resolution.
phase_notes.audit: Focused read completed for M6 acceptance, CUDA training wrapper/runtime, loader behavior, and current artifacts.
phase_notes.build: Searched for real adapters and collected hardware/dependency/runtime feasibility evidence. Only fixture adapter files were found, no NVIDIA CLI was visible, and the exported Docker image lacks real transformers/peft dependencies.
phase_notes.check: Contract JSON, strict model catalog verification, git diff --check, and git diff --cached --check are required for closeout.
phase_notes.done: Evidence recorded in artifacts/review/real_adapter_inference_evidence.md. M6-RC remains NOT_GO until real trained adapter endpoint evidence exists or release policy explicitly accepts fixture-adapter evidence.

pabcd.approved_scope: Real adapter artifact discovery, feasibility probes, endpoint evidence if possible, and evidence/operational docs.
pabcd.blocked_scope: No product code changes, no fake trained-adapter claims, no release GO changes.
pabcd.phase_completion_git_policy: When verification/evidence commands finish, stage, commit, and push this phase.
